title: Older-Adult Influenza/RSV Hospital Burden Early Warning (Public Data)
description: Reproducible, audit-ready pipeline that forecasts older-adult (65+) hospitalization burden for influenza (FluSurv-NET) and RSV (RSV-NET) using publicly available U.S. surveillance data, and translates forecasts into decision-relevant alerts (utility, expected cost, lead time).

creators.name: Zheng, Hongwei
